overall.description: A first-person walk through a dark, modern interior corridor with distinctive green accent lighting and reflective floors. The footage appears to be from a high-end video game engine, showcasing contemporary architectural design with glass walls and geometric ceiling patterns.

green accent lighting illuminating the right wall and ceiling edges

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in near-total darkness, with only faint distant lights visible. As the camera moves forward, a modern corridor entrance materializes, revealing green accent lighting along the walls and a geometric ceiling structure ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern corridor with green neon accents and glass display walls

agents.ego_description: proceeding steadily through the illuminated corridor past glass walls with interior displays

floor-to-ceiling glass partition revealing illuminated interior rooms
continuous horizontal green LED accent lighting running along the right wall
highly polished dark marble floor reflecting the ceiling lights and green accents
illuminated monitors or displays visible through the glass wall on the left

segments.scene_description: Walking through a sleek, modern corridor with green neon accent lighting on the right and glass walls on the left revealing illuminated interior spaces. The geometric ceiling pattern and reflective marble floor create a sophisticated, high-end commercial atmosphere as the camera approaches a brighter area at the corridor's end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a void of near-total darkness into a brightly lit, high-end modern corridor. It begins in a black expanse where only faint distant lights are visible, before a sleek entrance materializes to reveal vibrant green accent lighting and a geometric ceiling structure. As the camera advances, the space opens into a sophisticated hallway featuring neon green strips on the right and transparent glass walls on the left that expose illuminated interior rooms. The scene then shifts toward a more brilliant glow as the reflective marble floors mirror the overhead patterns, finally drawing the viewer toward a bright, open area at the corridor's end.
